title: Frontend Visual Effects
description: Canvas-based animations and visual effects: hero shader grid, liquid canvas physics (Point class), split-compare slider, framework periodic table viz

classes.name: Point
methods: update(): void — applies mouse repulsion, spring-back, friction, position integration

classes.name: PeriodicTable
methods: init(): void — clears container, calls renderTable()
renderTable(): void — groups commands by category, builds CSS grid, calls createCategoryGroup()
createCategoryGroup(category: string, commands: string[]): HTMLElement — creates label + flex row of elements
createElement(cmd: string, category: string): HTMLButtonElement — builds element tile with number/symbol/name/badge, attaches events
showTooltip(el: HTMLElement, cmd: string): void — builds + positions tooltip DOM, fades in
hideTooltip(): void — removes activeTooltip from DOM
dependencies: categoryColors, categoryLabels, commandSymbols, commandNumbers, commandDisplay (module-level consts)

functions.name: initHeroEffect
functions.description: Interactive canvas grid with physics-based point repulsion. Checks prefers-reduced-motion. Manages IntersectionObserver for animation pause/resume.
functions.call_chain: initHeroEffect → resize() → initGrid() [creates Point[]] → draw() [calls p.update() per frame via rAF]
functions.key_state: points: Point[], mouse: {x, y, radius}, animationId, gap, width, height

functions.name: initHeroShader
functions.description: Creates a WebGL mesh-gradient shader on #hero-shader element. Checks prefers-reduced-motion. Disposes on beforeunload.
functions.call_chain: initHeroShader → new ShaderMount(container, meshGradientFragmentShader, uniforms, undefined, 1.0)

functions.name: initSplitCompare
functions.description: Initializes a before/after split-screen slider with lerp animation. Returns instance object with destroy() and setPosition().
functions.parameters: container: HTMLElement, options: {defaultPosition=70, skewAngle=10, lerpSpeed=0.15, animationThreshold=40, onCrossThreshold, minPosition, maxPosition}
functions.call_chain: initSplitCompare → recalcSkewOffset() → updateSplit(defaultPosition); events → handleMouseMove → startAnimation → animate() [rAF loop → updateSplit]

return_interface.destroy(): removes all event listeners, cancels rAF, disconnects ResizeObserver

functions.retrigger_logic: if canvas/od-burn/od-sparks present: retrigger CSS animations individually; else clone+replace .split-content node

functions.name: initAllSplitCompare
functions.description: Queries all elements matching selector (default '.split-comparison'), calls initSplitCompare on each, returns array of instances.

functions.name: initFrameworkViz
functions.description: Entry point that finds #framework-viz-container and instantiates PeriodicTable.

key_relationships: initHeroEffect creates Point[] (composition — Point is inner class)
initSplitCompare returns SplitInstance (object interface with destroy/setPosition)
PeriodicTable.createElement calls showTooltip (self) and interacts with #fisheye-list DOM element
important_notes: Point class is NOT exported; it is a closure-scoped inner class inside initHeroEffect
liquid-canvas.js exports initHeroEffect (grid canvas), NOT initLiquidCanvas — naming mismatch vs scope description
hero-shader.js exports initHeroShader (WebGL shader), separate from canvas grid
SplitInstance is a plain object (not a class) returned by initSplitCompare
PeriodicTable.createElement attaches click handler that navigates #fisheye-list (external component coupling)
All effects check prefers-reduced-motion and bail out if enabled
IntersectionObserver used in initHeroEffect to pause rAF when off-screen
